name: mactech-captureos
description: MacTech CaptureOS — the operating system for defense contractors.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,workers -c blue,green,yellow "pnpm dev:api" "pnpm dev:web" "pnpm dev:workers"
scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && uv run fastapi dev src/mactech_api/main.py
scripts.dev:workers: cd apps/workers && uv run celery -A mactech_workers.celery_app worker --beat --loglevel=info
scripts.db:migrate: cd packages/db && uv run alembic upgrade head
scripts.db:downgrade: cd packages/db && uv run alembic downgrade -1
scripts.db:revision: cd packages/db && uv run alembic revision --autogenerate
scripts.db:seed: cd apps/api && uv run python -m scripts.seed
